sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_faces (index UInt64, faces Array(UInt64));
UPDATE h3_faces SET faces = h3GetFaces(599686042433355776) WHERE index = 599686042433355775;
SELECT index, faces FROM h3_faces WHERE index > 0;
SELECT h3GetFaces(599686042433355777) AS new_faces UNION SELECT h3GetFaces(599686042433355778) AS new_faces;
